stemHtml: An aircraft is performing an ILS CAT II approach and it is not equipped with a HUD. At DH the pilot can see 5 consecutive approach lights only. What's the correct procedure?

options.a: The pilot can continue below DH and land.
options.b: The pilot cannot continue the approach, he/she must go around.
options.c: The pilot can continue below DH down to 80 ft and land if they see the threshold.
options.d: The pilot can continue below DH down to 80 ft and land if they can see the edge lights.
